questions.question: Explain why homogeneous coordinates are used for representing transformations in computer graphics.
keyPoints: Allows representation of translation as matrix multiplication
Enables concatenation of different transformation types
Essential for efficient implementation in graphics pipelines

questions.question: Describe with examples how the order of transformations affects the final result. Show the different outcomes when applying translation then rotation versus rotation then translation to a point.
keyPoints: Example with specific coordinates and angles
